# INDeleteTasksTaskUnsupportedReason.noTasksFound

**Case**

No relevant tasks found.

## Declaration

```swift
case noTasksFound
```

## Reasons

- **INDeleteTasksTaskUnsupportedReason.noTasksInApp**: No tasks exist in the app.
